title: dolichos tenuiflorus
intro: Dolichos tenuiflorus, also known as the Horse Gram or Madras gram, is a type of legume plant native to India and parts of Asia. It is rich in protein, fiber, and various minerals, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The medicinal properties of Dolichos tenuiflorus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, and its herbal preparations include teas, capsules, and powders that can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
